debug_info.goal:
A : Type u_1
inst✝² : CommRing A
inst✝¹ : IsDomain A
inst✝ : @IsKrullDomain A inst✝² inst✝¹
⊢ IsIntegrallyClosed A

failed_attempts:
rw [isIntegrallyClosed_iff (FractionRing A)]
  intro x hx
  rw [← Algebra.mem_bot, ← IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot A]
  simp only [Subalgebra.mem_iInf, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  intro p hp
  haveI := IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization p hp
  haveI : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := inferInstance
  exact Localization.subalgebra_mem_of_isIntegral p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors x hx

      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := this
      rw [← ha]
      exact ⟨a, rfl⟩

  constructor
  · exact fun _ ↦ ⟨_, rfl⟩

    have : x ∈ (⊥ : Subalgebra A (FractionRing A)) := by
